description: HR has mandated a new exit interview workflow to combat high turnover. Using the configuration directive at ~/Desktop/exit_process_config.txt, configure the Exit module in Sentrifugo. This includes creating the specified Clearance Departments within the Exit module's settings, setting up the Question Categories, and mapping the specific Exit Questions to their categories. Ensure any pre-existing legacy exit questions are removed or deactivated.

expected_questions.text: Did you feel you were equipped with the necessary tools to perform your job?
How would you rate the physical working conditions?
Do you feel your compensation was competitive with the market?
Were you satisfied with the benefits package provided?

legacy_questions: How would you rate your manager?
